title: Pipeline crashes on alternative date formats
body: _parse_date only accepts %Y-%m-%d. Rows using slashes or timestamps raise ValueError and abort the run.

title: Malformed CSV rows abort the whole run
body: A single bad row in read_csv stops processing. With fail_fast disabled we should skip and log bad rows.

title: Deduplicate keeps the wrong record
body: deduplicate keeps the first occurrence; we want the most recent by created_at instead.

title: Output file overwrites silently
body: write_jsonl truncates the destination without warning, losing prior output. Add append/overwrite control.

title: Runner does not report row counts per stage
body: run() only returns the final count. Add per-stage metrics (extracted, transformed, unique).

title: amount column not validated
body: normalize_row coerces amount with float() and silently turns junk into 0. Validate and report bad amounts.

title: No glob-based input discovery
body: PipelineConfig has input_glob but runner takes an explicit list. Wire the glob into the runner.
